title: Study Lesson
description: A single portable lesson. Authored prose sections are Markdown strings (no raw HTML). Scripture appears as references only — never quoted text — until a licensed text path lands (docs/content-rights.md). Participant responses, huddle discussion, and progress are out of scope: this file is study content only.

id.description: Stable within the lesson (q01…, p01…). Never renumbered when wording changes — #13 round-trips on it.

lesson_id.description: Stable, permanent ID (e.g. lsn-come-follow-me). Never renamed once published.

order.description: Position within the series; must agree with the series file's lessons array.

source_attribution.description: Optional lesson-level override; null inherits from the series.

rights_note.description: Optional lesson-level override; null inherits from the series.

primary_gospel_event_id.description: Robertson event this lesson centers on (content/harmony/robertson-1922-outline.json). Must exist in the harmony dataset.

related_gospel_event_ids.description: Additional Robertson events the lesson touches. May be empty.

phase.description: One of the 5 SonLife phases once mapped; null until ministry review (#21).

sub_phase.description: Reserved for finer SonLife arrangement encoding; null for now.

phase_mapping_status.description: Same enum and default ("pending") as the harmony dataset — the two files must never use different vocabularies for the same state.

scripture_reference.description: The passage(s) this lesson studies. References only — no quoted Scripture text anywhere in this file.

huddle_discussion_prompts.description: Prompts a leader uses in the huddle (ids p01, p02, …). Prompts are content; participant responses never live in these files.

leader_notes.description: Guidance for the huddle leader. Rendered only on HUB, never on STUDY.
